findings.title: Mock ComfyUIClient patch path may not match runtime import location
findings.why_it_matters: Implementation imports ComfyUIClient at runtime (line 79) to avoid circular deps, but tests patch 'projects.tools.comfyui.client.ComfyUIClient'. If the import path doesn't match, mocks are bypassed.
findings.suggested_fix: Patch at usage location after import

findings.title: asyncio.gather(return_exceptions=False) hides which crop in batch failed
findings.why_it_matters: If 2 out of 5 crops fail, first exception is raised but which pair failed is lost
findings.suggested_fix: Add test for batch partial failure scenario

findings.title: Stitch tests never validate rescaling/unpadding math; only check shape/dtype
findings.why_it_matters: Complex transforms with off-by-one risks. Bug in pad/rescale math produces wrong output silently.
evidence: test only checks shape not pixel values
findings.suggested_fix: Add test validating mask gradient and rescaled dimensions

findings.title: VideoEncoder tests dont verify FFmpeg command construction, only success flag
findings.why_it_matters: Codec typo, flag order error would pass tests silently

findings.title: Batch processing doesn't guarantee in-order results on partial failure
findings.why_it_matters: Pipeline assumes zip(crop_indices, results) preserves order. If batch fails, mapping is broken.
evidence: batch logic fails if any task fails
findings.suggested_fix: Use dict {frame_idx: result_path} instead of list results

findings.title: encode_from_config() hardcodes fps=30.0 instead of reading config.output_fps
findings.why_it_matters: Users cannot control frame rate; always outputs 30fps

residual_risks: Async timeout handling: Batch processing with timeout not tested under real network jitter
Feather blending visual quality: No rendered output validation; could have visible seams
Frame extraction robustness: No validation of frame count vs video duration
Mask loading edge cases: No tests for channel mismatch, all-zero masks, NaN values
ComfyUI API contract drift: Mocks don't validate against real schema
Crop region math fragility: Off-by-one errors compound through pipeline
Batch ordering under failure: Missing frames silently skipped
File I/O race conditions: No test for concurrent writes
testing_gaps: No test for single-pixel mask regions
No test for mask region partially outside frame
No test for ComfyUI naming variations
No test for variable frame rate video
No test for frame quality metrics
